title: Specification Section
description: Schema for a CSI-formatted specification section within Division 07. Sections are the primary organizational unit containing requirements, prohibitions, allowances, and associated obligations.

section_id.description: Unique identifier for this specification section.

requirements.description: Array of requirement IDs in this section.

prohibitions.description: Array of prohibition IDs in this section.

allowances.description: Array of allowance IDs in this section.

submittals.description: Array of submittal_requirement IDs in this section.

qualifications.description: Array of qualification_requirement IDs in this section.

warranties.description: Array of warranty_requirement IDs in this section.

testing.description: Array of testing_requirement IDs in this section.

control_layers_served.description: Control layer IDs from the shared registry served by this section.
